approaches.name: Brute Force

approaches.name: Optimal

lessons.title: Right Triangle Star Pattern

lessons.title: GitHub Portfolio hard 3 (debugging #3)
lessons.description: Tag and release workflow for backend deployment.
lessons.command:
git checkout main
git pull
git tag -a v1.4.0 -m "Release 1.4.0"
git push origin v1.4.0
lessons.terminalOutput:
Tagged v1.4.0
* [new tag] v1.4.0 -> v1.4.0
lessons.explanation: Signed, versioned tags anchor release artifacts.
interviewTips: Explain why this approach is chosen over alternatives.
Mention one optimization and one edge case.

lessons.title: GitHub Portfolio hard 1 (debugging #4)
lessons.description: Recover accidentally lost commit with reflog.
lessons.command:
git reflog
git checkout <lost-sha>
git cherry-pick <lost-sha>
lessons.terminalOutput:
HEAD@{2}: commit: RBAC rules fix
[main ef4521] RBAC rules fix
lessons.explanation: Reflog tracks HEAD movements and helps recovery.
interviewTips: Explain why this approach is chosen over alternatives.
Mention one optimization and one edge case.
